headline: Information Security & Cloud Infrastructure Engineer

skills.splunk: Built SPL dashboards and correlation searches reducing SOC triage MTTR by 35%. Tuned detections for brute-force, impossible travel, and privilege escalation patterns.
skills.azure_ad: Deployed conditional access, MFA enforcement, and RBAC role assignments across hybrid identity environments. Managed Intune compliance baselines for endpoint posture.
skills.windows_laps: Implemented Windows LAPS for local administrator password rotation and audited privileged access across enterprise workstations.

education.school: The University of Texas at Dallas
education.details: Focus: Information Security, Cloud Systems, and Applied Cryptography

projects.title: Hermes Autonomous Application Engine
projects.summary: Hardened local daemon orchestrating job applications with WAL-backed SQLite state, Playwright workers, and Grok cognitive tailoring.

projects.title: SOC Detection Tuning Lab
projects.summary: Splunk ES content development pipeline with false-positive reduction metrics and MITRE ATT&CK mapping.

bullets: Engineered Splunk SPL detections that reduced false-positive alert volume by 35% across a 12,000-endpoint estate.
Deployed Azure AD Conditional Access and Intune compliance policies securing 2,400+ hybrid-joined devices.
Automated Windows LAPS rollout via PowerShell, eliminating static local admin credentials on managed endpoints.
